entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used for oil and food.

entities.name: ICGV 86015
entities.description: An early-maturing, high-yielding breeding line of groundnut.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity quickly.

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a large amount of crop per unit area.

entities.name: HUNG LOC 25
entities.description: A variety name for ICGV 86015 released in Vietnam.

entities.name: VIETNAM
entities.description: A country in Southeast Asia where ICGV 86015 is suitable for intercropping.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity.

entities.name: CASSAVA
entities.description: A root vegetable crop used for intercropping with ICGV 86015.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used for intercropping with ICGV 86015.

entities.name: BARD 92
entities.description: A variety name for ICGV 86015 released in Pakistan.

entities.name: PAKISTAN
entities.description: A country in South Asia where ICGV 86015 is proposed for release.

entities.name: DOUBLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two crops on the same land in a single year.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal crop used for double-cropping with ICGV 86015.
